channel.title: Riefkohl Law Blog
channel.description: Legal analysis and case law from Riefkohl Law

item.title: Banking & Insurance Trust Disputes in Puerto Rico — Case Analysis
item.dc:creator: hans
item.content:encoded:
Need Help With a Trust or Estate Dispute?

If you are involved in a banking, insurance, or trust dispute in Puerto Rico, understanding the relevant case law is essential to protecting your rights. Attorney Hans Riefkohl at Riefkohl Law provides strategic counsel on trust litigation, fiduciary duty claims, and asset protection.

Schedule a Free Consultation →

Related resources: Puerto Rico Trust Law Guide | Legal Resources | Trust Law Article Series
item.excerpt:encoded: Puerto Rico case law on banking and insurance trust disputes. Court rulings on surety bonds, fraudulent transfers, mortgage foreclosure, and trust assets.

item.title: Breach of Fiduciary Duty Cases in Puerto Rico Trust Law
item.dc:creator: hans
item.content:encoded:
Concerned About Trustee Misconduct?

If you suspect a trustee has breached their fiduciary duties or mismanaged trust assets, prompt legal action is critical. Attorney Hans Riefkohl at Riefkohl Law has extensive experience with trust litigation and fiduciary duty claims in Puerto Rico.

Schedule a Free Consultation →

Related resources: Puerto Rico Trust Law Guide | Fiduciary Duties Guide | Trust Law Article Series
item.excerpt:encoded: Key Puerto Rico court decisions on breach of fiduciary duty in trust administration. Trustee liability, imprudent investments, and beneficiary rights.

item.title: Trust Beneficiary Rights & Liquidation Procedures in Puerto Rico
item.dc:creator: hans
item.content:encoded:
Questions About Trust Beneficiary Rights?

Understanding your rights as a trust beneficiary — or your obligations as a trustee — requires careful analysis of Puerto Rico trust law. Attorney Hans Riefkohl at Riefkohl Law provides guidance on trust disputes, beneficiary claims, and trust administration.

Schedule a Free Consultation →

Related resources: Puerto Rico Trust Law Guide | Legal Resources | Trust Law Article Series
item.excerpt:encoded: Puerto Rico case law on trust beneficiary standing, procedural rights, and trust liquidation. Court rulings on intervention and winding down trusts.

item.title: Public & Government Trust Governance Cases in Puerto Rico
item.dc:creator: hans
item.content:encoded:
Need Guidance on Public Trust Governance?

Public trust disputes involve unique legal challenges at the intersection of trust law and government accountability. Attorney Hans Riefkohl at Riefkohl Law provides counsel on trust governance, fiduciary compliance, and government contract matters.

Schedule a Free Consultation →

Related resources: Puerto Rico Trust Law Guide | Government Contracts | Legal Resources
item.excerpt:encoded: Case analysis of Puerto Rico public trust governance, pension fund trusts, and government trustee duties. Fiduciary accountability in public trusts.

item.title: Notable Puerto Rico Trust Law Cases — Discovery, Tax & Fiduciary
item.dc:creator: hans
item.content:encoded:
Facing a Trust Law Issue in Puerto Rico?

Every trust dispute has unique facts and legal considerations. Attorney Hans Riefkohl at Riefkohl Law provides experienced counsel on trust litigation, estate planning, and fiduciary matters throughout Puerto Rico.

Schedule a Free Consultation →

Related resources: Puerto Rico Trust Law Guide | Legal Resources | Trust Law Article Series
item.excerpt:encoded: Analysis of key Puerto Rico trust cases covering discovery disputes, tax treatment of trust assets, and fiduciary breach claims.

item.title: Testamentary Trust & Succession Dispute Cases in Puerto Rico
item.dc:creator: hans
item.content:encoded:
Planning Your Estate or Facing a Succession Dispute?

Puerto Rico's forced heirship rules and testamentary trust requirements demand specialized legal knowledge. Attorney Hans Riefkohl at Riefkohl Law helps families navigate estate planning, succession disputes, and trust creation under Puerto Rico law.

Schedule a Free Consultation →

Related resources: Puerto Rico Trust Law Guide | Wills vs. Trusts Guide | Estate Planning Services
item.excerpt:encoded: Puerto Rico court decisions on testamentary trusts, forced heirship disputes, and succession planning. Case analysis on leg\u00edtima, wills, and estates.

item.title: Trust Property Disputes in Puerto Rico — Case Law Analysis
item.dc:creator: hans
item.content:encoded:
Dealing With a Trust Property Dispute?

Trust property disputes require careful legal analysis of both trust law and Puerto Rico property law. Attorney Hans Riefkohl at Riefkohl Law provides strategic counsel on trust litigation, asset protection, and property matters.

Schedule a Free Consultation →

Related resources: Puerto Rico Trust Law Guide | Asset Protection | Legal Resources
item.excerpt:encoded: Puerto Rico court decisions on trust property disputes, real estate held in trust, and trustee management. Key rulings for property owners and trustees.

item.title: Trust Validity Challenges in Puerto Rico — ODIN Registration & Nullity
item.dc:creator: hans
item.content:encoded:
Ensure Your Trust Is Properly Structured

A trust that fails to meet Puerto Rico's registration and validity requirements can be declared null — with devastating consequences for your estate plan. Attorney Hans Riefkohl at Riefkohl Law helps clients create and validate trusts that comply with Law 219-2012 and ODIN requirements.

Schedule a Free Consultation →

Related resources: Puerto Rico Trust Law Guide | Wills vs. Trusts | Trust Law Article Series
item.excerpt:encoded: Puerto Rico cases on trust validity challenges, ODIN registration requirements, forced heirship violations, and trust nullity.

item.title: Trust in Family Law & Trustee Removal Cases — Puerto Rico
item.dc:creator: hans
item.content:encoded:
Facing a Family Trust Dispute or Trustee Issue?

Family trust disputes and trustee removal proceedings require sensitive and strategic legal representation. Attorney Hans Riefkohl at Riefkohl Law provides experienced counsel on trust litigation, family law trust issues, and fiduciary matters.

Schedule a Free Consultation →

Related resources: Puerto Rico Trust Law Guide | Estate Planning Services | Legal Resources
item.excerpt:encoded: Puerto Rico case law on trusts in divorce, trustee removal, and family trust disputes. Marital property in trusts and grounds for removing trustees.

item.title: Alevras v. Brewster — Independent Contractor vs. Employee Under ABC Test
item.dc:creator: hans
item.content:encoded:
Need Legal Guidance on a Similar Issue?

Understanding how courts have ruled on cases like this one can be critical to your legal strategy. Contact Riefkohl Law for experienced counsel on trust law, estate planning, and litigation matters in Puerto Rico.

Schedule a Free Consultation →

Related resources: Puerto Rico Trust Law Guide | Case Analysis Blog | Legal Resources
item.excerpt:encoded: NJ Appellate Division affirms dismissal of wage claims against attorney estate, finding paralegal was independent contractor under ABC test.

item.content:encoded:
Need Legal Guidance on a Similar Issue?

Understanding how courts have ruled on cases like this one can be critical to your legal strategy. Contact Riefkohl Law for experienced counsel on trust law, estate planning, and litigation matters in Puerto Rico.

Schedule a Free Consultation →

item.excerpt:encoded: Federal court case analysis on health law association claims against decedent estate. Trust and estate litigation implications.
